description: As an inventory manager optimizing packing stations, create a frequency distribution analysis of order quantities in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx). Create a bar chart titled 'Line Item Quantity Frequency' showing the count of orders for each discrete quantity size, sorted by quantity in ascending order. Save the workbook as 'quantity_distribution'.
